title: The result of SELECT ... BETWEEN is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE B (id Int32, value Decimal(10, 2)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT() FROM B WHERE (value BETWEEN 10.49 AND 20.01) OR (value BETWEEN 19.99 AND 30.30);
key_bug_features: Incorrect result from SELECT ... BETWEEN query
